subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qabl-i-Báqir! Upon thee be My glory and My loving-kindness. The Most Exalted Pen beareth witness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل باقر علیک بهائی و عنایتی قلم اعلی شهادت
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @praise and encouragement
